bird.name: 黑纹穗鹛
bird.summary: 黑纹穗鹛（学名：Stachyris nigrorum），是画眉科穗鹛属的一种，为菲律宾的特有种。全球活动范围约为470平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为濒危。 黑纹穗鹛的平均体重约为21.6克。栖息地包括种植园和亚热带或热带的湿润山地林。

relations.subject: 黑纹穗鹛
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest in the range of 900–1,600 masl. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 黑纹穗鹛
relations.evidence: It inhabits montane forest between 950 and 1,600 m, chiefly occurring between 1,050 and 1,400 m, generally favouring the lower storey
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 黑纹穗鹛
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest in the range of 900–1,600 masl. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 黑纹穗鹛
relations.evidence: IUCN has assessed this bird as Endangered. This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
